ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/terraform-azurerm-avm-res-storage-storageaccount
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/terraform-azurerm-avm-res-storage-storageaccount
Language: hcl
Terraform Azure Verified Resource Module for Storage Account

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/serverless-sample-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/serverless-sample-app
Language: hcl
Explore Datadog's serverless observability features with this sample app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
Language: hcl
Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-datadog-platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-datadog-platform
Language: hcl
Terraform module to configure and provision Datadog monitors, custom RBAC roles with permissions, Datadog synthetic tests, Datadog child organizations, and other Datadog resources from a YAML configuration, complete with automated tests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS S3 resources 🇺🇦
